top_tweets.author: splinetool
top_tweets.name: Spline

top_tweets.text:
A public company CEO told me AI coding has had negligible impact on his engineering teams, instead the real transformation has been on their product and design teams using Replit. 

I asked him how does he reconcile this with CEOs saying that 25-50% of code is generated by AI?
top_tweets.author: amasad
top_tweets.name: Amjad Masad

top_tweets.text:
Input optional product

Don't ask your users for input. Coming up with input is hard, and a barrier to use. Think of users as wanting to play. We have AI - predict the input! Design products into autonomous environments. Allow users to play by steering a bit.

top_tweets.text:
Having breakfast with my husband. He notices I am wearing gold 2-inch hoop earrings.

Him: “Oh how long have you been wearing those?”

Me: “…every day for the past 7 years.”
